Table of Contents

Struct Employee

Namespace
Day4_Red
Assembly
Day4_Red.dll

Represents an employee in a company Employee is identified by ID, Name, Security_level, Salary, HireDate, Gender, and Privilege. 

public struct Employee : IComparable<Employee>
Implements
IComparable<Employee>

Methods

CompareTo(Employee)

compares employees based on their hiring date

public int CompareTo(Employee other)

Parameters

other Employee

other employee to compare with

Returns

int

negative if this employee was hired before the other, positive if this employee was hired after the other, and zero if they were hired on the same date

overrides the ToString method to provide a string representation of the employee's information
